title: Successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length
description: Verify that a user can successfully create an account when providing a unique email and a password of exactly 8 characters.

title: Account creation rejected due to duplicate email
description: Verify that account creation fails when the email already exists in the system, enforcing the unique email business rule.

title: Account creation rejected due to password shorter than 8 characters
description: Verify that account creation fails when the password is 7 characters long, violating the minimum length requirement.

title: Email uniqueness validation before account creation
description: Verify that the system checks for email uniqueness before proceeding with account creation, preventing duplicate accounts.

title: Password length validation at account creation
description: Verify that the system validates password length (minimum 8 characters) during account creation and rejects passwords that are too short.

title: Account creation with password exactly at minimum boundary (8 characters)
description: Verify that account creation succeeds when the password is exactly 8 characters long, testing the lower boundary of the password length rule.

title: Account creation with password just below minimum boundary (7 characters)
description: Verify that account creation fails when the password is 7 characters long, testing just below the minimum boundary of the password length rule.
